title: WLAN Deployment Lifecycle
subtitle: End-to-end process of designing, deploying, and optimizing enterprise wireless networks.

steps.title: Site Survey
steps.desc: Analyze coverage requirements, building layout, RF conditions, and user density.
details: Analyze building layout and floor plans
Perform predictive and active site surveys

steps.title: WLC Configuration
steps.desc: Configure management interfaces, WLANs, security policies, and controller settings.

steps.title: Access Point Deployment
steps.desc: Install APs, connect uplinks, and verify CAPWAP registration with the controller.

steps.title: Client Validation
steps.desc: Verify authentication, roaming behavior, DHCP assignment, and application access.

steps.title: RF Optimization
steps.desc: Tune channels, transmit power, QoS policies, and interference mitigation settings.
